Our Story

More Than a
Haircut

Yaseen's Studio was built on a single conviction — that every man deserves a space where craft, care, and confidence converge. Located in the heart of Karachi, our studio is a sanctuary designed for the modern gentleman.

From the moment you walk in, you'll notice the difference. Lush greenery overhead, sleek black stations, natural wood accents — every detail curated to give you an experience that goes far beyond a trim.

"We don't just cut hair.
We sculpt confidence."
— Muhammad Yaseen, Founder
What We Offer

The Menu

Book a Session
01
The Signature Cut

Consultation, precision scissor or clipper cut, neck shave with hot towel finish, and expert styling tailored to your face shape.

From Rs. 800
~45 minutes
02
Hot Towel Shave

Traditional straight-razor shave with pre-shave oil, hot & cold towels, and soothing post-shave balm. A ritual, not a routine.

From Rs. 600
~30 minutes
03
Beard Sculpting

Detailed beard shaping, precision lineup, condition & moisturize. Define your look with structured craftsmanship.

From Rs. 500
~25 minutes
04
The Executive

The full experience — haircut, hot towel shave, facial treatment, and premium styling. Reserved for those who expect the best.

From Rs. 1,800
~90 minutes

Why Choose Us

The Yaseen's
Difference

✦
Premium Environment

A thoughtfully designed space with living greenery, ambient lighting, and a calming atmosphere that sets the tone before you sit down.

✂
Master Craftsmen

Our barbers are trained in both classic and contemporary techniques — every cut is a considered, deliberate act of craft.

◈
Premium Products Only

We use professional-grade grooming products that care for your hair and skin, not just style them.

◉
Open 7 Days a Week

Open from 11am to 10pm (Friday 9am–5pm). We work around your schedule, not the other way around.
